overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a medieval village at night. The character walks through torch-lit cobblestone streets, enters a rustic building to look around, then continues through the village square toward a fortified stone gate. The atmosphere is dark and moody with contrasting warm torchlight against blue night shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval village street with timber houses

events.description: encountering guards in red armor carrying torches walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily through the narrow torch-lit village street between wooden buildings

notable_agents.action: guards in red armor with torches patrolling the street toward Geralt

wooden house with thatched roof and lit windows
metal basket with bright orange flames providing warm illumination
wet reflective cobblestone pavement with grass growing between stones
rough wooden fence blocking off a side area

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow medieval village street at night, flanked by timber-framed houses. The cobblestone path is illuminated by burning torch baskets. Guards in red armor carrying torches approach from the opposite direction, creating a tense atmosphere in the enclosed alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic interior storage room with wooden shelves

events.description: entering wooden door into dimly lit interior space
turning around to survey the interior room and shelves
exiting the building back to the village street

agents.ego_description: Geralt enters the building and examines the interior storage space with shelves of goods

entered.detail: dark wooden door frame leading into the building interior
rough stone masonry walls inside the building
tall wooden shelves holding various pottery and goods
clay pots and vases arranged on the shelves
round wooden storage barrels stacked against the wall
bundles of dried plants hanging from the ceiling
small lantern providing warm interior lighting

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a rustic building through a wooden doorway, revealing a dimly lit storage room with stone walls and wooden shelves. The interior contains pottery, wooden barrels, and hanging dried herbs. After briefly surveying the room, he turns and exits back to the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square with market stalls

events.description: exiting building into open village square with market stalls
passing group of guards in red armor patrolling the square

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the open village square passing wooden market stalls and guards

notable_agents.action: group of three guards in red armor with torches standing in the path

entered.detail: wooden market stall with canvas awning and goods displayed
wooden cart with canvas cover parked on the street
open cobblestone plaza area wider than the previous street
front of wooden building with lit windows and doorway
tall stone wall of a larger building in the background

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the building into a more open village square with market stalls and wooden carts. The space is wider than the narrow street, with timber houses on one side and stone buildings visible in the distance. He passes a group of guards in red armor carrying torches as he continues through the cobblestone plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified stone gate approach with stairs

events.description: approaching stone staircase leading up to fortified gate
ascending stone stairs toward large iron-bound wooden gate

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks up the stone stairs toward the large fortified gate at the edge of the village

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading upward to the gate
thick stone fortification wall with crenellations on top
massive wooden gate reinforced with iron bands and studs
arched stone entrance frame around the wooden door

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the edge of the village where a stone staircase leads up to a large fortified gate. The heavy iron-bound wooden door is set within thick stone walls with battlements above. He ascends the stairs toward the imposing entrance, leaving the village square behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic medieval village that gradually opens into a wide plaza and culminates at a fortified entrance. It begins in a narrow cobblestone alley flanked by timber-framed houses, where the dim night is punctuated by burning torch baskets and the approach of guards in red armor. The camera then follows Geralt as he steps through a wooden doorway into a dimly lit storage room filled with pottery and hanging herbs, before turning back to exit the building. As he emerges, the environment expands into a wide village square populated with market stalls and wooden carts, where he passes another group of torch-bearing guards. The scene finally shifts toward the village perimeter, ascending a stone staircase that leads up to a massive, iron-bound wooden gate set within thick stone battlements.
